title: EquityDetailsData
description: Provider-specific balance details, returned only when the request includes expand=equityDetails. All fields are nullable; only fields relevant to the account's provider are populated. Trading accounts populate available/frozenCash/currentPNL/totalUsedMargin; Crypto accounts populate cryptoId, the balance variants, fiatConversionCurrency, and orderIndex.

available.description: Available balance or buying power (Trading, Options, MoneyFarm, Cash).

frozenCash.description: Cash frozen by the platform pending settlement (Trading).

currentPNL.description: Current unrealized profit and loss on open positions (Trading).

totalUsedMargin.description: Total margin used by open positions (Trading).

totalBalance.description: Total balance in native crypto units, including pending (Crypto).

spendableBalance.description: Spendable balance in native crypto units (Crypto).

totalBalanceInFiat.description: Total balance converted to fiat, including pending (Crypto).

fiatConversionCurrency.description: ISO 4217 currency code used for the InFiat values (Crypto).
